# digithings — Agent Instructions

> Open-core modular agentic stack — quant finance, RAG, document search, general agents

---

## Read First (every session, in order)

1. [`AGENTS.md`](AGENTS.md) — stack-wide non-negotiable rules and autonomous development protocol
2. `{component}/AGENTS.md` before touching **any** component — contains pre-flight checklist, rules, test commands
3. [`docs/agents/AGENT_WORKFLOW.md`](docs/agents/AGENT_WORKFLOW.md) — end-to-end autonomous development workflow
4. [`docs/agents/COMPONENT_ROUTING.md`](docs/agents/COMPONENT_ROUTING.md) — maps file prefix → AGENTS.md + ARCHITECTURE.md + tests

---

## Non-Negotiable Rules

- Polars only — never pandas
- Pydantic v2 models everywhere — no raw dicts
- MCP-first tool design — every capability is a discoverable MCP tool
- LangGraph supervisor+subgraph orchestration only
- LiteLLM routing (caching mandatory)
- NautilusTrader for all backtest/optimize
- Score ≥8 Security, ≥8 Quality, ≥7 Optimization, ≥9 Accuracy before PR
- Never touch live-trading paths without explicit human approval

---

## Components

| Component | Port | Description | Agent Guide |
|-----------|------|-------------|-------------|
| `digigraph` | 8000 | LangGraph orchestration brain — MCP tools, OpenAI-compatible API | [digigraph/AGENTS.md](digigraph/AGENTS.md) |
| `digiquant` | 8001 | NautilusTrader backtest/optimize, strategy registry | [digiquant/AGENTS.md](digiquant/AGENTS.md) |
| `digisearch` | 8002 | RAG pipeline — ingest, chunk, embed, vector search | [digisearch/AGENTS.md](digisearch/AGENTS.md) |
| `digismith` | 8003 | LangSmith-aligned observability library + status API | [digismith/AGENTS.md](digismith/AGENTS.md) |
| `digiclaw` | — | Heartbeat runner + append-only JSONL audit log | [digiclaw/AGENTS.md](digiclaw/AGENTS.md) |
| `digibase` | — | Shared Python library — error envelopes, HTTP helpers, OTel | [digibase/AGENTS.md](digibase/AGENTS.md) |
| `digikey` | 8005 | JWT + scoped API key auth plane — RS256, JWKS, token exchange | [digikey/AGENTS.md](digikey/AGENTS.md) |
| `digichat` | 3005 | Next.js BFF + React chat UI — Auth.js, Drizzle, AI SDK streaming | [digichat/AGENTS.md](digichat/AGENTS.md) |

---

## Scoring — Self-Score Before Opening Any PR

| Dimension | Minimum | Rubric |
|-----------|---------|--------|
| Security | ≥8/10 | [docs/scoring/SECURITY.md](docs/scoring/SECURITY.md) |
| Quality | ≥8/10 | [docs/scoring/QUALITY.md](docs/scoring/QUALITY.md) |
| Optimization | ≥7/10 | [docs/scoring/OPTIMIZATION.md](docs/scoring/OPTIMIZATION.md) |
| Accuracy | ≥9/10 | [docs/scoring/ACCURACY.md](docs/scoring/ACCURACY.md) |

Full rubric criteria: [`docs/scoring/`](docs/scoring/)

---

## Agent Capabilities

- `make agents-init` — Generate platform adapter files from agents.yml (`scripts/agents_init.py`)
- `make score` — Self-score staged changes against 4-dimension rubrics (`scripts/score.py`)
- `make clean-imports` — Remove unused Python imports with ruff (dry-run by default) (`scripts/clean_imports.py`)
- `make find-stale` — Detect unused functions, classes, and variables (`scripts/find_stale.py`)
- `make commit` — Conventional commit helper — validates type(component): description format (`scripts/commit_helper.sh`)
- `make pr` — PR creation with template pre-fill via gh CLI (`scripts/create_pr.sh`)
- `make new-task` — Create a GitHub Issue for the agent backlog (agent-task label) (`scripts/create_issue.sh`)
- `make status` — List open agent-task issues, filterable by component (`scripts/list_tasks.sh`)
- `make task` — Execute a backlog task end-to-end in an isolated git worktree (`scripts/run_task.sh`)
- `make parse-error` — Parse a Python stack trace and identify the DigiThings component (`scripts/parse_traceback.py`)

---

## Backlog

- [`docs/agent-backlog/INDEX.md`](docs/agent-backlog/INDEX.md) — current themes and in-progress work
- GitHub Issues labeled `agent-task` — granular tasks with acceptance criteria
- Task spec format: [`docs/agent-backlog/SPEC_TEMPLATE.md`](docs/agent-backlog/SPEC_TEMPLATE.md)

---

## Human Gate — Always Escalate For

- Any change to auth, JWT, or cryptography code (digikey/)
- Any change that touches live-trading paths
- Score below threshold on any dimension
- New external service dependency or infrastructure change
- Novel architecture decision not covered by existing ARCHITECTURE.md specs

---

## Auto-Merge Eligibility

Doc-only PRs matching paths in [`docs/agent-backlog/AUTOMERGE.md`](docs/agent-backlog/AUTOMERGE.md) with label `automerge-docs` can squash-merge automatically after CI passes.
Code PRs require all score thresholds met + CI green + no human gate triggered.
